title: Enable Caching for Forms
excerpt: It would be great to enable caching for Forms (maybe something that can be done with the new WorkForms?). We have repeat clients that are using a Monday.com form to submit creative requests. It would be great if they cou…

posts.author: nad-proserv (Shane Hochstetler)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be great to enable caching for Forms (maybe something that can be done with the new WorkForms?). We have repeat clients that are using a Monday.com form to submit creative requests. It would be great if they could auto-fill portions of the form with basic content like their contact information.

posts.author: Hannesvg (Hannes van Graan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Nad

We have some similar idea. We want to make use of information on boards and have them displayed on the form. So the form does not only feed information into boards, it also get fed information form existing board’s information.

It would be great to make use of a form, not to only feed information into boards, but make use of selected columns and display that information on the form.
